title: Department Manager Vacancy at V-Mart Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at V-Mart Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
